title: sterculia neriifolia
intro: Sterculia neriifolia, also known as the Horse Radish Tree, is a tropical plant native to Asia and Australia, belonging to the Sterculiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's roots, leaves, and seeds are used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Sterculia neriifolia are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory problems, skin infections, and gastrointestinal disorders.
